strengths: Proven ETL/ELT pipeline building with Airflow
weaknesses: No direct Generative AI / LLM project evidence
No RAG or Text-to-SQL implementations listed
No mention of LangGraph or vector DBs
improvement_bullets: Architected and maintained data orchestration workflows using Apache Airflow, with a foundational understanding of DAG-based orchestration logic applicable to Dagster transitions.
Engineered production-grade ELT pipelines using dbt to implement Medallion Architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold) for improved data modularity and downstream analytics reliability.
Integrated REST API data sources into Python-based pipelines, applying RAG-ready data processing techniques to prepare unstructured text for LLM embedding workflows.
Designed and optimized SQL schemas in PostgreSQL, specifically focusing on Text-to-SQL compatibility and efficient data retrieval for generative AI applications.
Leveraged Python and Pandas to develop backend data services, utilizing FastAPI frameworks to expose structured datasets for downstream AI/ML consumption.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because of Smartwork IT Services' focus on integrating Generative AI into enterprise-grade data platforms. What interests me about working for Smartwork IT Services is its commitment to building scalable AI-driven infrastructure, which aligns perfectly with my professional goal of bridging the gap between raw data and actionable AI insights. I believe my expertise in building robust data pipelines and my experience with modern transformation tools like dbt would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my recent work, I have approached data problems with a focus on automation and quality. In fact, I developed a production-grade ELT pipeline that ingested high-volume economic data from APIs into Google BigQuery, ensuring data integrity via Great Expectations and automated CI/CD workflows. This reduced analyst query time and ensured the data was clean and structured for Power BI reporting. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role would allow me to bring my proficiency in Python-based data modeling to support your AI agent and RAG pipeline initiatives. Additionally, my role as an Analytics & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills. I led the design of an operational KPI reporting system that identified inefficiencies and drove a 40% improvement in operational productivity. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in dimensional modeling and Python development to work on building scalable data infrastructure at your company. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data quality align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
